fields.name: Primary Key
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Offset (Time)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the period of time to wait before issuing a new purchase order, production order, or transfer order.

fields.name: Order Promising Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code that identifies the number series that you select for order promising.

fields.name: Order Promising Template
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the requisition worksheet template that you select for order promising.

fields.name: Order Promising Worksheet
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the requisition worksheet that you select for order promising.
